query:
SELECT id, trelloId, name, listName, dueDate, createdAt 
FROM atis_cards 
WHERE name LIKE '%Blog post%' 
ORDER BY name, createdAt;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zdYySmWxto697z.f7331094e4e6 --database 8WaJog2pAVrGepmXoS2wYU --execute SELECT id, trelloId, name, listName, dueDate, createdAt 
FROM atis_cards 
WHERE name LIKE '%Blog post%' 
ORDER BY name, createdAt;
